title: Velvety Herbal Norwegian Stir-fry
description: A sick-day-friendly herbal stir-fry featuring a blend of aromatic herbs and a touch of spice, made in a vinaigrette-style dressing with sriracha for extra heat, suitable for vegans.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup soy sauce (vegan)
ingredients.notes: Replace with lemon juice for a non-fermented option.

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons sriracha
ingredients.notes: Adjust to taste for heat level.

instructions: Heat sesame oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add minced garlic and cook until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
Add chopped kale and baby spinach to the wok; cover and cook for 2-3 minutes until wilted but still crisp.
Stir in mixed herbs and cook for another minute.
Pour in soy sauce (or lemon juice) and sriracha. Stir well to combine all ingredients.
Squeeze in lime juice, adjust seasoning with salt if needed, and serve immediately over rice or noodles.
